inline_comments.message: A binary ms word file is not supported.  You can convert this to rst (see http://onap.readthedocs.io/en/latest/guides/onap-developer/how-to-use-docs/converting-formats.html#converting-to-rst )

Both this index file and the converted to rst word file need to be added to the aaf/authz repository in the top level docs folder.  The path to index.rst when aaf/authz is initialized as a submodule in  the docs project will be 

docs/submodules/aaf/authz.git/index.rst
